title: psacalium perezii
intro: Psacalium perezii, also known as the Yerba de la Estrella, is a plant species native to Mexico and parts of Central America, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Psacalium perezii include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as reducing fever and alleviating pain. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often in combination with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
